description: Style NoteLet only transform your everyday life from grey and monotonous to fun, colourful and creatively eventful! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these yummy tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and on-trend when you're wearing anything from this summery collection.Product DetailsBlack top, front in chiffon fabric with lining, back in jersey fabric, has flutter raglan sleeves in chiffon, V-neck with soft slim collar with long tie-ups in the front, tucks from neckline at front which flare out to hemMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash coolDo not bleach or tumble dryCool ironSizeLoose FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
